title: AgentOffer OfferProvider Request Schema v0.1
description: Request body that AON sends to a Partner's OfferProvider endpoint (POST {base_url}/v1/offers/query). This Partner-facing payload is derived from Query context, intent, and supply-side constraints for AON-to-Partner dispatch. Uses RFC 2119 requirement levels (REQUIRED/RECOMMENDED/OPTIONAL).

request_id.description: Unique request identifier. UUIDv7 recommended. REQUIRED on the AON → Partner channel: AON always generates and sends one so Partner logs / replay protection / billing reconciliation can correlate every dispatch. Partner MAY echo it back in headers (`X-AON-Request-Id`) and logs.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the request. Set by AON at dispatch time.

test_mode.description: When true, the request is a test and Partner SHOULD NOT generate real tracking or billing events. The authoritative test-mode signal is the X-AON-Test HTTP header; this body field is retained for protocol parity with OfferQueryRequest.

context.description: Contextual information about the requesting platform, session, and user.

platform.description: Information about the requesting platform or agent.

conversation_id.description: Conversation or thread identifier within the session.

user_profile.description: User profile information for intent matching and targeting.

user_agent.description: Optional raw or normalized end-user user-agent string for diagnostics and compatibility. Do not use as a stable identifier.

intent.description: The user's intent expressed as multimodal content.

constraints.description: Partner-facing supply-side constraints applied by the Partner before returning eligible offers. Current v0.1 dispatches only expose category_types.
